description: The entity identifies, develops, and implements activities to recover from identified security incidents.

subcriteria.name: recovery_procedures
subcriteria.reference_text: Disaster recovery procedures for restoring affected systems including rebuilding from images, restoring from backups, and redeploying from infrastructure as code. RTO and RPO targets defined. Recovery runbooks documented for critical services.

subcriteria.name: recovery_testing
subcriteria.reference_text: Annual disaster recovery test or tabletop exercise simulating incident scenarios. Test results documented including time to recover, gaps identified, and improvement actions. Business continuity plans updated based on test findings.

subcriteria.name: lessons_learned
subcriteria.reference_text: Post-incident lessons learned documented and incorporated into incident response and recovery procedures. Preventive controls added or detection rules updated based on incident patterns. Incident response plan revised annually.

mismatch_signals.reason: Log management/SIEM is CC7.2, not incident recovery.
Access management is CC6.x, not incident recovery.
